description: count_bases returns a dict with the correct count for each of A, T, C, G (including 0 for a base that never appears).

criterion: Keys in A, T, C, G order
description: The table is built with its keys in the order A, T, C, G, as taught — so the answer matches the checker.
look_up returns the value stored under the given codon, using table[codon] instead of searching by hand.
